zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabel Clifton於1434年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Sir Gervase Clifton38歲，母親Isabel Francis47歲。她於大約1455年與Sir John Jernegan在英國素福爾可索莫利頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年在英國素福爾可索莫利頓享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabel Clifton于1434年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲Sir Gervase Clifton38岁，母亲Isabel Francis47岁。她于大约1455年与Sir John Jernegan在英国素福爾可索莫利頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年在英国素福爾可索莫利頓享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabel Clifton was born in 1434, in Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Gervase Clifton, was 38 and her mother, Isabel Francis, was 47. She married Sir John Jernegan about 1455, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1475, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabel Clifton est née en 1434, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gervase Clifton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabel Francis, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Jernegan environ 1455, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1475, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabel Clifton 1434 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gervase Clifton 38 und ihre Mutter Isabel Francis 47. Sie hat um 1455 in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England Sir John Jernegan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1475 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Clifton è nata il nel 1434 nel Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Gervase Clifton, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Isabel Francis, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Jernegan circa 1455, nel Somerleyton, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1475, nel Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Cliftonが1434年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Gervase Cliftonは38歳，母Isabel Francisは47歳であった。約1455年にイギリススフォルクソメルリートンでSir John Jerneganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年にイギリススフォルクソメルリートンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Clifton(이)가 1434년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gervase Clifton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Francis(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 대략 1455년 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에서 Sir John Jernegan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Clifton nasceu em 1434, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gervase Clifton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Francis, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Jernegan aproximadamente 1455, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1475, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabel Clifton родилась в 1434 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gervase Clifton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Francis, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Jernegan около 1455 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1475 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabel Clifton nació en 1434, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gervase Clifton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabel Francis, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Sir John Jernegan aproximadamente 1455, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1475, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
